summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long AMD Daily ETF (AMDL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Advanced Micro Devices stock. AMDL was launched on Mar 4, 2024 and is issued by GraniteShares.

holdings.infoBox: AMDL is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings. The top holdings are Graniteshares Long Amd Swap Cantor stock at 52.88%, Recv Long 2x Amd Trs Nm at 41.87%, Recv Long 2x Amd Trs Bmo at 39.21%, Amd Equity Swap at 35.01%, and Recv Long 2x Amd Trs Cs at 22.82%.
